title: Transaction Fraud Detection
description: Real-time ML scoring of card and ACH transactions to flag anomalous activity before authorization. Reduces false positives by 30–50% vs. rules-only systems.
regNote: Model validation per SR 11-7 required; fair lending review if decisioning affects protected classes.

title: Application Fraud Screening
description: Identity and synthetic identity fraud detection at account opening using graph ML and device intelligence signals.
regNote: FCRA, ECOA considerations; adverse action notices may be required.

title: Credit Underwriting Model
description: ML-based credit risk scoring for consumer or SME lending, incorporating alternative data signals alongside traditional bureau data.
regNote: ECOA/Reg B adverse action, fair lending disparate impact testing, SR 11-7 model risk management.

title: Early Warning System (EWS)
description: Predictive monitoring of commercial loan portfolio health to flag deteriorating credits 90–180 days before default.
regNote: Stress testing integration; model validation required under SR 11-7.

title: AML Transaction Monitoring
description: Augment rules-based AML systems with unsupervised ML clustering to surface novel money laundering typologies and reduce alert fatigue.
regNote: FinCEN guidance on AI in BSA/AML; explainability required for SAR decisions.

title: Customer Churn Prediction
description: Propensity model predicting deposit and card customer attrition 30–60 days ahead, enabling proactive retention offers.
regNote: Ensure retention offers comply with fair lending — don't offer better terms only to certain demographics.

title: Next Best Action (NBA) Engine
description: Real-time personalization engine recommending the optimal product, offer, or service action for each customer across all channels.
regNote: Fair lending disparate impact analysis on offer targeting; CAN-SPAM for email channels.

title: AI-Powered Chatbot / Virtual Assistant
description: LLM-powered conversational AI for customer service, handling routine inquiries, account management, and guided product discovery.
regNote: UDAAP risk on AI-generated advice; disclosure of AI identity; call recording compliance.

title: Document Intelligence (Loan Processing)
description: Computer vision and NLP to auto-extract, classify, and validate documents in mortgage and commercial loan origination.
regNote: Human-in-the-loop required for high-stakes decisions; audit trail for adverse decisions.

title: Regulatory Report Automation
description: NLP and workflow automation to generate DFAST/CCAR narratives, FR Y-14 schedules, and CRA analyses with reduced human effort.
regNote: Human sign-off mandatory; model validation for stress test models.

title: Algorithmic Trading Signal Generation
description: ML models that identify alpha signals from alternative data (satellite imagery, sentiment, news flow) for systematic trading strategies.
regNote: Market manipulation safeguards; SEC/FINRA algo trading requirements; model testing protocols.

title: Portfolio Risk Stress Testing
description: Deep learning models for scenario-based market risk simulation, replacing or augmenting Monte Carlo approaches for faster VaR/ES computation.
regNote: Basel III/IV model validation; SR 11-7; Federal Reserve stress test submission requirements.

title: Climate Risk Scoring
description: Physical and transition risk scoring for loan and investment portfolios using geospatial ML and climate scenario models.
regNote: Fed climate scenario analysis guidance; SEC climate disclosure rules; TCFD alignment.

title: Insider Threat Detection
description: Behavioral ML models analyzing employee activity patterns (trading, communication, access logs) to detect policy violations and potential fraud.
regNote: Employee privacy laws (GDPR, state laws); legal hold-off review before investigations; HR involvement.

title: Smart Collections Prioritization
description: ML propensity models to prioritize collection outreach and predict optimal contact timing, channel, and settlement offer.
regNote: FDCPA compliance; UDAAP review of AI-driven settlement offers; do-not-call list integration.

title: CECL / Loan Loss Reserve Forecasting
description: ML-enhanced probability-of-default (PD) and loss-given-default (LGD) models for more accurate expected credit loss estimation under ASC 326.
regNote: FASB ASC 326; auditor review required; model validation documentation critical.

title: AI-Assisted Compliance Monitoring
description: NLP models that continuously scan communications (emails, chat, voice transcripts) for policy breaches, escalations, and regulatory keywords.
regNote: SEC/FINRA communications surveillance requirements; GDPR data minimization for voice data.

title: Dynamic Pricing & Rate Optimization
description: Reinforcement learning models that dynamically set deposit rates, loan pricing, and fee structures to optimize net interest margin and competitive positioning.
regNote: Reg Z/TILA disclosure requirements; fair lending disparate impact testing mandatory.

title: Real-Time Liquidity Forecasting
description: ML models predicting intraday and 30-day liquidity positions using behavioral deposit models and payment flow patterns.
regNote: LCR/NSFR reporting; DFAST liquidity scenario integration; model validation.

title: Autonomous Underwriting (STP)
description: Fully automated straight-through processing for eligible consumer and SME credit applications, with AI making final decisioning without human review.
regNote: Adverse action rights; ECOA/FCRA; CFPB guidance on automated decisioning; UDAAP.

title: AI-Native Treasury Management
description: AI orchestration of asset-liability management, FX hedging, and investment portfolio rebalancing with minimal human intervention.
regNote: Investment Advisers Act (if applicable); fiduciary duty considerations; senior management accountability.

title: Generative AI for Research & Insights
description: LLM-powered research assistants generating market commentaries, earnings call summaries, and investment memos from structured and unstructured data.
regNote: SEC regulations on investment advice; hallucination risk controls; human editorial review required.

title: KYC / CDD Automation
description: AI-powered know-your-customer workflows automating entity resolution, document verification, and risk rating for onboarding and periodic reviews.
regNote: FinCEN CDD Rule; OFAC screening integration; human review for high-risk ratings.

title: Intelligent Process Automation (IPA)
description: Combining RPA with ML and NLP to automate complex back-office workflows such as exception handling, reconciliations, and data entry.
regNote: Audit trail requirements; change management for SOX-controlled processes.

title: Predictive Maintenance (ATMs/Infrastructure)
description: IoT sensor data + ML to predict ATM failures, branch equipment downtime, and IT infrastructure issues before they impact customers.
regNote: Vendor access controls; BCBS 239 data governance if using risk infrastructure data.

title: AI-Driven Personalized Financial Advice
description: Personalized financial planning recommendations powered by LLMs, customer financial data, and life event signals — delivered at scale.
regNote: Investment Advisers Act; fiduciary duty; CFPB guidance; suitability requirements.

title: Network Analytics for Fraud
description: Graph neural networks analyzing transaction networks to detect organized fraud rings, mule accounts, and first-party fraud patterns invisible to per-account models.
regNote: Data sharing agreements for consortium analytics; privacy considerations.

title: AI Model Risk Monitoring Dashboard
description: Centralized platform monitoring all deployed AI/ML models for performance drift, fairness metrics, and regulatory compliance status in real time.
regNote: SR 11-7 ongoing monitoring requirement; board-level reporting for material models.

title: Conversational AI for Branch Staff
description: Internal AI copilot giving branch and relationship managers real-time product recommendations, customer insights, and compliance guidance during client interactions.
regNote: UDAAP on AI-generated recommendations; licensing requirements if advice qualifies as investment guidance.

title: Synthetic Data Generation
description: Generate privacy-preserving synthetic customer and transaction datasets for model training, stress testing, and vendor sharing without exposing PII.
regNote: GLBA, CCPA, GDPR considerations; validate synthetic data fidelity before use in regulatory models.

title: AI-Powered M&A Due Diligence
description: LLM-based contract analysis, risk flag extraction, and financial data room review to accelerate M&A and partnership due diligence cycles.
regNote: Attorney-client privilege for legal review; document confidentiality; data room access controls.

title: Cross-Sell Propensity Scoring
description: ML models scoring existing customers on likelihood to purchase additional products (savings, insurance, investment), enabling targeted outreach.
regNote: Fair lending review of targeting criteria; CAN-SPAM; opt-out compliance.

title: Real-Time Payments Fraud
description: Sub-100ms ML decisioning for RTP and FedNow instant payment fraud detection, balancing precision against the irreversibility of real-time payments.
regNote: Nacha/FedNow operating rules; Reg E dispute handling; consumer liability limits.

title: Voice Biometrics / Fraud Prevention
description: Passive voice authentication in IVR and call center to verify customer identity and detect deepfake voice attacks in real time.
regNote: BIPA (Illinois Biometric Privacy Act); GDPR; state biometric privacy laws; explicit consent required.

title: Sovereign AI / Private LLM Deployment
description: Fine-tuned or privately hosted large language models on institution's own infrastructure, enabling generative AI applications without data egress to third-party providers.
regNote: Third-party risk management (TPRM) for model providers; OCC guidance on AI; data residency requirements.

title: ESG Scoring & Reporting
description: ML models ingesting unstructured ESG disclosures, news, and supply chain data to compute ESG scores for portfolio companies and loan counterparties.
regNote: SEC climate disclosure rules; EU SFDR; greenwashing risk; data vendor due diligence.

title: AI-Assisted Regulatory Change Management
description: NLP-powered monitoring of regulatory filings, agency publications, and legislative databases to auto-classify new rules, assess impact, and trigger remediation workflows.
regNote: Human legal review required; cannot fully automate compliance interpretation.

title: Correspondent Banking Risk Analytics
description: Network and ML analytics for correspondent and nostro/vostro relationship risk, identifying high-risk jurisdictions and flagging unusual payment flows at the network level.
regNote: OFAC; FinCEN Section 314; Wolfsberg Group guidance; de-risking considerations.

title: Collateral Valuation AI
description: Automated valuation models (AVMs) and computer vision analysis of property images to supplement or replace traditional appraisals in mortgage origination.
regNote: FIRREA appraisal requirements; GSE (Fannie/Freddie) AVM acceptance criteria; fair housing review.

title: AI-Powered Expense & Invoice Fraud
description: ML models detecting duplicate, inflated, or fictitious vendor invoices and employee expense claims in AP and T&E workflows.
regNote: SOX controls for finance processes; audit committee reporting.
